<HUAWEI-SWITCH-ECMP3>display ip routing-table pro bgp
Proto: Protocol        Pre: Preference
Route Flags: R - relay, D - download to fib, T - to vpn-instance, B - black hole route
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Routing Table : _public_
         Destinations : 3        Routes : 4
Destination/Mask    Proto   Pre  Cost        Flags NextHop                                  Interface
       10.0.0.0/24  BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.1                             Eth-Trunk1
                    BGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.2                            Eth-Trunk2
       10.0.1.0/24  IBGP  60   0             RD  192.168.1.4                            GigabitEthernet0/0/4
       10.0.2.0/24  EBGP  60   100           RD  192.168.1.5                            GigabitEthernet0/0/5
